title: Left-pane shortcuts
excerpt:
Hi, i spotted during one of the training videos shortcuts down the left hand side of the page, in the same area as the inbox etc.    How do i get these?   Perhaps its an enterprise option? 
  
Where does this get set?   …

posts.author: stuartsjg (Stuart Graham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, i spotted during one of the training videos shortcuts down the left hand side of the page, in the same area as the inbox etc. How do i get these? Perhaps its an enterprise option?

image102×1010 34.2 KB

Where does this get set? Im perhaps searing for the wrong thing which is why i cant see it.

posts.author: stuartsjg (Stuart Graham)
posts.cookedHtml: I still see this on videos, is it a forthcoming feature or something i cant see somewhere?
